jd_text:
🚨 VP – Business Development | Digital Assets | UAEWe are partnering with a leading institutional digital asset platform to appoint a Vice President – Business Development to drive capital raising and strategic growth across the GCC region.This is a senior front-office role focused on developing relationships with GCC family offices, institutional investors, and UHNW clients, helping scale the firm’s asset management platform and digital asset investment strategies.
Key responsibilities• Raise AUM from GCC family offices and institutional investors• Develop and manage relationships with UHNW investors and key regional stakeholders• Represent the firm at industry events, investor meetings, and conferences• Identify new opportunities for digital asset and hedge fund investment strategies• Work closely with internal trading, custody, and investment teams to deliver institutional solutions
Ideal profile• 10+ years’ experience in wealth management, asset management, or institutional fundraising• Strong network across GCC family offices and UHNW investors• Experience raising capital for alternatives, hedge funds, or digital assets• Deep understanding of the GCC investment landscape
🌍 Coverage: GCC family offices & institutional investorsThis is an opportunity to join a well-established institutional digital asset firm and play a key role in expanding its presence across one of the world’s fastest-growing investor markets.
